zh-CN.title: 保存报告
zh-CN.body: 把这次核心模式、行动处方和复测入口留住。
zh-CN.placement: 结果页底部、首屏次级动作或报告保存区域。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是免费产品动作，不改变报告权限。

en.title: Save your report
en.body: Keep your pattern, action prescription, and retest path in one place.
en.placement: Use in result-page footer, secondary hero action, or saved-report area.
en.do_not_overread: This is a free product action, it does not change report access.

zh-CN.title: 邮件回看
zh-CN.body: 把报告发送给自己，适合之后复盘或继续和 Agent 对话。
zh-CN.placement: 结果页底部、首屏次级动作或报告保存区域。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是免费产品动作，不改变报告权限。

en.title: Email revisit
en.body: Send the report to yourself so you can revisit it or continue with the Agent later.
en.placement: Use in result-page footer, secondary hero action, or saved-report area.
en.do_not_overread: This is a free product action, it does not change report access.

zh-CN.title: PDF 报告
zh-CN.body: 生成可保存版本，适合个人复盘，不建议用于招聘或评估他人。
zh-CN.placement: 结果页底部、首屏次级动作或报告保存区域。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是免费产品动作，不改变报告权限。

en.title: PDF report
en.body: Create a saved copy for personal reflection, not for hiring or evaluating another person.
en.placement: Use in result-page footer, secondary hero action, or saved-report area.
en.do_not_overread: This is a free product action, it does not change report access.

zh-CN.title: 分享卡
zh-CN.body: 只分享模式句，不分享详细分数和敏感解释。
zh-CN.placement: 结果页底部、首屏次级动作或报告保存区域。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是免费产品动作，不改变报告权限。

en.title: Share card
en.body: Share the pattern sentence, not detailed scores or sensitive interpretation.
en.placement: Use in result-page footer, secondary hero action, or saved-report area.
en.do_not_overread: This is a free product action, it does not change report access.

zh-CN.title: 复测提醒
zh-CN.body: 4–8 周后重新查看模式是否稳定，低置信结果可更早复测。
zh-CN.placement: 结果页底部、首屏次级动作或报告保存区域。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是免费产品动作，不改变报告权限。

en.title: Retest reminder
en.body: Check whether the pattern is stable after 4–8 weeks; low-confidence results can be retested sooner.
en.placement: Use in result-page footer, secondary hero action, or saved-report area.
en.do_not_overread: This is a free product action, it does not change report access.

zh-CN.title: 相关测试
zh-CN.body: 用 Big Five、RIASEC、MBTI 作为补充视角，不把 EQ 当成唯一结论。
zh-CN.placement: 结果页底部、首屏次级动作或报告保存区域。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是免费产品动作，不改变报告权限。

en.title: Related tests
en.body: Use Big Five, RIASEC, or MBTI as complementary lenses, not as replacements for EQ.
en.placement: Use in result-page footer, secondary hero action, or saved-report area.
en.do_not_overread: This is a free product action, it does not change report access.

zh-CN.title: 问问 Agent
zh-CN.body: 带着一个真实场景提问，例如反馈、冲突、边界或压力恢复。
zh-CN.placement: 结果页底部、首屏次级动作或报告保存区域。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是免费产品动作，不改变报告权限。

en.title: Ask the Agent
en.body: Ask about one real scene, such as feedback, conflict, boundaries, or recovery.
en.placement: Use in result-page footer, secondary hero action, or saved-report area.
en.do_not_overread: This is a free product action, it does not change report access.
